primary.description: Deep Emerald/Sage replacing the bright teal for a more grounded, premium B2B feel.

glass.classes: bg-white/70 dark:bg-slate-900/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-200/50 dark:border-slate-800/50

layouts.page_structure: Sidebar layout for details. Left sidebar (w-64 or col-span-2) + Main content area (col-span-10).
layouts.grids: The 'Bento' High Density Grid (for Dashboards) - tight gaps (gap-6), F-pattern data priority.
layouts.spacing: Generous spacing philosophy: p-6 to p-8 for cards. gap-6 to gap-8 between sections.
layouts.tables: Sticky headers, 1px bottom borders (border-b border-slate-200), py-3 px-4 cells, right-aligned numbers.

motion.tabs_to_sidebar: Smooth opacity/x-axis slide transition when switching sidebar nav items (framer-motion AnimatePresence).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets APCA > 60 for body, > 45 for large text.

media.icons: lucide-react (stroke-width 1.5 for a cleaner, premium look)
media.charts: Recharts (with customized tooltips using the glass visual enhancer, and emerald primary colors)

images.description: Modern warehouse exterior for the 'Locations' tab or Overview card.

sidebar_nav.style: Vertical list, active state has bg-emerald-50 dark:bg-emerald-900/20 and text-emerald-800 dark:text-emerald-300 with a 3px left border (border-l-emerald-600). Inactive state has text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100 dark:hover:bg-slate-800/50.

cards.style: Flat background (bg-white dark:bg-slate-900), 1px border, subtle ambient shadow. No heavy neumorphism.

status_badges.style: Pill shaped (rounded-full), px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium. Success: bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-800. Warning: bg-amber-100 text-amber-800. Neutral: bg-slate-100 text-slate-800.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install `lucide-react` if not present. Use stroke-width of 1.5 for a minimal, premium feel.
Refactor the Distributor Detail page: Remove the overflowing horizontal tabs and implement a left sidebar navigation layout.
Implement the 'Bento' High Density Grid for the Overview dashboard: metric cards spanning columns appropriately with tight gaps (gap-6).
Customize the data tables in 'Deliveries', 'Shipments', and 'Settlements' to have clean headers, generous horizontal padding (px-4 or px-6), and clear visual hierarchy (no heavy zebra striping).
Use 'Deep Emerald' (#065F46) as the primary brand color, replacing the bright teal to align with a Trustworthy B2B Corporate aesthetic.
Apply `data-testid` to all sidebar links, buttons, and table rows for testing.
Add micro-interactions (hover translations, active states) using the defined motion guidelines.
CRITICAL: Write Javascript (.js/.jsx) files, not Typescript (.tsx).
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed.
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use sonner for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/frontend/src/components/ui/sonner.js or similar.
